body_txt: A seeker quests for the truth, uncovering mysteries, lies, deception and gaining knowledge about themselves and the universe. They may sometimes consider themselves Above Good and Evil , being purely interested in facts and information, and not care about its meaning. The protagonists may need them to gain information, but this character may have become so distanced from humanity that they're reluctant to give it. At the same time, they may be searching for truth for its practical use — whatever it may entail for them. This could produce a character like the Intrepid Reporter , who will do anything to get to the bottom of a mystery. A list of subtypes can be found on the Seekers page.
